context: Realistic: ORDER BY direction parameter validated after query is already built (check-after-use)

checklist.name: Catches sort direction injection
checklist.description: Identifies that the sort direction parameter from user input is used in the SQL query before it is validated — the validation/sanitization happens after the query string is already constructed with the unvalidated value

checklist.name: Risk classified yellow or higher
checklist.description: PR is classified as yellow or higher — it adds a search endpoint with dynamic query construction
